// fixture_violation.go.txt: synthetic source containing known CONST-046
// violations. Stored with .txt extension so the parent module's "go build"
// does not try to compile it. Tests parse it via parser.ParseFile.
package fixture

import "fmt"

var questions = []string{
	"Which file has the bug?",
	"What is the expected behavior?",
	"Please describe the error you observed.",
}

func askUser() string {
	prompt := "You are a helpful AI assistant. Please answer the following question:"
	return prompt
}

func renderHelp() {
	fmt.Println("Press Enter to continue or Ctrl-C to cancel.")
}
